Class PosInOccurrence

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.prover.sequent.PosInOccurrence
public class PosInOccurrence extends Object
Represents a position within a formula contained in a sequent. It enables navigation and analysis of term structures.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    PosInOccurrence(SequentFormula sequentFormula, PosInTerm posInTerm, boolean inAntec)
    Constructs a PosInOccurrence representing a position in a sequent formula.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    depth()
    Computes the depth of this position within the formula.
    PosInOccurrence

    Moves down to the specified child in the term structure and returns a new PosInOccurrence representing the new position.

    Compares this PosInOccurrence with another object for equality based on their contents.
    boolean

    Checks if this PosInOccurrence refers to the exact same formula as another and to an equal position within this formula.

    Creates a new PosInOccurrence for a specific position in a formula within the given sequent.

    Retrieves the index of the deepest subterm this position points to.
    int

    Determines whether this position is in the antecedent of the sequent.
    boolean

    Checks if this position is at the top level of the formula.

    Returns an iterator for traversing the path of this position within the term structure.
    PosInTerm
    posInTerm()
    The usage of this method is strongly discouraged, use iterator() instead.
    PosInOccurrence
    replaceSequentFormula(SequentFormula p_newFormula)
    Replaces the formula associated with this occurrence and returns a new object pointing to the same position within the new formula.
    SequentFormula

    Retrieves the formula associated with this position.
    Term
    subTerm()
    Retrieves the subterm pointed to by this position.
    PosInOccurrence
    topLevel()
    Moves to the top level of the formula and returns a new PosInOccurrence for that position.
    @Nullable PosInOccurrence
    up()
    Moves up one level in the term structure and returns a new PosInOccurrence representing the new position.

    Methods inherited from class Object

  • Constructor Details

    • PosInOccurrence

      public PosInOccurrence(SequentFormula sequentFormula, PosInTerm posInTerm, boolean inAntec)
      Constructs a PosInOccurrence representing a position in a sequent formula.
      Parameters:
      sequentFormula - The formula the position belongs to.
      posInTerm - The position within the formula.
      inAntec - True if the position is within the antecedent of the sequent.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - If sequentFormula or posInTerm is null.

  • Method Details

    • findInSequent

      public static PosInOccurrence findInSequent(Sequent seq, int formulaNumber, PosInTerm pos)
      Creates a new PosInOccurrence for a specific position in a formula within the given sequent.
      Parameters:
      seq - The sequent containing the formula.
      formulaNumber - The index of the formula within the sequent (the first formula has number 1).
      pos - The position within the formula to be represented.
      Returns:
      A new PosInOccurrence pointing to the specified position in the formula.

    • sequentFormula

      public SequentFormula sequentFormula()
      Retrieves the formula associated with this position.
      Returns:
      The SequentFormula this position refers to.

    • depth

      public int depth()
      Computes the depth of this position within the formula. Top-level positions (see isTopLevel()) have a depth of 0.
      Returns:
      The depth of the position.

    • up

      public @Nullable PosInOccurrence up()
      Moves up one level in the term structure and returns a new PosInOccurrence representing the new position.
      Returns:
      A new PosInOccurrence one level higher in the term structure.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If the position is already at the top level.

    • down

      public PosInOccurrence down(int i)
      Moves down to the specified child in the term structure and returns a new PosInOccurrence representing the new position.
      Parameters:
      i - The index of the child to move to.
      Returns:
      A new PosInOccurrence pointing to the specified child.

    • getIndex

      public int getIndex()
      Retrieves the index of the deepest subterm this position points to. Returns -1 if the position is top-level.
      Returns:
      The index of the subterm or -1 if at the top level.

    • isInAntec

      public boolean isInAntec()
      Determines whether this position is in the antecedent of the sequent.
      Returns:
      True if the position is in the antecedent, otherwise false.

    • isTopLevel

      public boolean isTopLevel()
      Checks if this position is at the top level of the formula.
      Returns:
      True if the position is at the top level, otherwise false.

    • posInTerm

      public PosInTerm posInTerm()

      The usage of this method is strongly discouraged, use iterator() instead. describes the exact occurrence of the referred term inside

      invalid reference 
      #formula()
      Returns:
      the position in the formula of the SequentFormula of this PosInOccurrence.

    • topLevel

      public PosInOccurrence topLevel()
      Moves to the top level of the formula and returns a new PosInOccurrence for that position.
      Returns:
      A PosInOccurrence representing the top level.

    • subTerm

      public Term subTerm()
      Retrieves the subterm pointed to by this position.
      Returns:
      The Term at this position.

    • eqEquals

      public boolean eqEquals(Object obj)
      Compares this PosInOccurrence with another object for equality based on their contents.
      Parameters:
      obj - The object to compare with.
      Returns:
      True if the two objects describe the same occurrence, otherwise false.

    • equals

      public boolean equals(@Nullable Object obj)
      Checks if this PosInOccurrence refers to the exact same formula as another and to an equal position within this formula.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      obj - The object to compare with.
      Returns:
      True if both refer to the same formula, otherwise false.

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object

    • replaceSequentFormula

      public PosInOccurrence replaceSequentFormula(SequentFormula p_newFormula)
      Replaces the formula associated with this occurrence and returns a new object pointing to the same position within the new formula.
      Parameters:
      p_newFormula - The new formula.
      Returns:
      A PosInOccurrence pointing to the same position in the new formula. It is not tested whether this position exists within p_newFormula

    • iterator

      public PIOPathIterator iterator()
      Returns an iterator for traversing the path of this position within the term structure.
      Returns:
      A PIOPathIterator for traversing this position.
